Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Well, one of the reasons is to remind me of h-home.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He stutters towards the end of his sentence, and his eyes wander far away from you. Not physically -- thank the elements -- but they follow his mind to some different dimension altogether.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: When he returns, he adopts this expression that lingers somewhere between sorrow and anger. Not one aimed at you, though. At least, you can't think of a reason why it would be.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I am sorry. This is reminding me of something not so nice.

Line.Text: The flags represent my home, so I do not ever forget where I come from.
